perf_hint: one pass over the uniform and no textures, so frame time scales with pixel count alone — on software rendering preview with `--sample 10s` before committing to 1080p

params.name: speed
params.description: How fast the tunnel is flown, in bores per second.

params.name: rings
params.description: How many ring gates light the bore at any depth.

params.name: stripes
params.description: How many stripes run around the walls; 0 leaves the walls dark.

params.name: twist
params.description: How hard the wall stripes spiral along the bore; negative spirals the other way.

params.name: pulse
params.description: How hard the kick swells the walls around the viewer.

params.name: flash
params.description: How brightly a hit lights the gates as they pass.

params.name: fog
params.description: How deep the far end of the bore sinks into darkness.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the bore.
